ServiceId.description: The ID of the service to update.

ActiveDate.description: The date that the service became active.

ExpirationDate.description: The date that the service is to expire.

Count.description: The number of client service sessions to update.

Test.description:
When `true`, indicates that input information is to be validated, but not committed.
When `false` or omitted, the database is affected.
Default: **false**
